programmes.show_description: Wesley Neailey/Katelyn Parker. An 11-year-old boy goes missing near his home in Newcastle. Plus, a vulnerable young woman puts her trust in the wrong man. S4, Ep8

A Father's Dark Secrets. A mother-of-two vanishes from her home in Utah in 2009. As police investigate, dark family secrets emerge, and a tragedy follows that no one saw coming. S1, Ep2
Fallen Star. In 2021, KJ Taylor was killed during a drive-by shooting. On a trail of CCTV, the truck is spotted stalking KJ in the hour before the shooting. S9, Ep11

programmes.show_description: Where Is Tom Brown? Conspiracy theories rock a Texas town after a high school football player mysteriously vanishes. Some very unusual suspects emerge. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programmes.show_description: Local football hero TK Kelly carried the dreams of his small California city on his shoulders, but for someone close to TK, jealousy was motivation enough to kill. S1, Ep5

programmes.show_name: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights

programmes.show_name: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights

programmes.show_description: Who Shot Darrent Williams? On New Year's Eve, NFL player and former Texas high school football star Darrent Williams is at a party. Soon after midnight, he's shot dead. S2, Ep4
